% Auto-generated PGFPlots template — grouped horizontal bars
% Data: new_plots/data/perf_by_env_mean_wide.csv

% ------- configurable knobs -------
% overall size
\newcommand{\PerfPlotWidth}{0.6\linewidth}
% compute plot height from bin size and number of categories
\newlength{\PerfBinHeight} \setlength{\PerfBinHeight}{8pt} % vertical space allocated per category
\newcommand{\PerfNumCats}{43} % update if symbolic y list changes
\newcommand{\PerfPlotHeight}{\dimexpr \PerfNumCats\PerfBinHeight\relax}
% typography
\newcommand{\PerfFont}{\scriptsize}
\newcommand{\PerfYFont}{\tiny}
% bar geometry
\newlength{\PerfBarWidth} \setlength{\PerfBarWidth}{2pt}
\newlength{\PerfBarSep}   \setlength{\PerfBarSep}{\PerfBarWidth} % center-to-center spacing so adjacent bars touch
% margins around data to create visual breathing room
\newcommand{\PerfEnlargeY}{0.03}
\newcommand{\PerfEnlargeX}{0.04}
% ---------------------------------

\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
      title={Performance by Environment},
      xlabel={Average Score},
      tick label style={font=\PerfFont},
      yticklabel style={font=\PerfYFont},
      ytick=data,
      % modern, ggplot-like styling
      grid=none,
      axis background/.style={fill={rgb,255:red,243; green,246; blue,255}}, % very light blue
      axis lines=left,
      axis line style={draw=black!50,-},
      x axis line style={-},
      y axis line style={-},
      tick style={draw=none},
      legend style={font=\PerfFont, draw=none, fill=none},
      legend pos=outer north east,
      label style={font=\PerfFont},
      title style={font=\PerfFont},
      width=\PerfPlotWidth,
      height=\PerfPlotHeight,
      xmin=0,
      xtick distance=0.5,
      symbolic y coords={ants, bbq, blicket, block_breaker, buoyancy, carrace, chinese_checkers, chomp, colour_lines, crystallization, diffusion, dino, disease, egg, exp_particles, gameoflife, gravity, gravity_3, grow, ice, kaleidoscope, lightning_rod, lights_new, logic_gates, magnets, mario, masters_logic, minesweeper, nim, pacman, paint, particles, peg_solitaire, ricochet_robots, sand, scotland_yard, set, snake, space_invaders, tictactoe, twiddle, waterplug, wind},
      yticklabel={\expandafter\obfsname\expandafter{\tick}},
      y dir=reverse,
      bar width=\PerfBarWidth,
      enlarge y limits=\PerfEnlargeY,
      enlarge x limits={upper, value=\PerfEnlargeX},
    ]
    % grouped bars per environment with distinct, ggplot-like colors
    \addplot+[xbar, bar shift=\dimexpr-2\PerfBarSep\relax, draw=none, mark=none, fill={rgb,255:red,86; green,180; blue,233}] table [x=claude-4-sonnet, y=environment, col sep=comma] {new_plots/data/perf_by_env_mean_wide.csv};
    \addplot+[xbar, bar shift=\dimexpr-1\PerfBarSep\relax, draw=none, mark=none, fill={rgb,255:red,230; green,159; blue,0}]   table [x=gemini-2.5-pro, y=environment, col sep=comma] {new_plots/data/perf_by_env_mean_wide.csv};
    \addplot+[xbar, bar shift=\dimexpr 0\PerfBarSep\relax, draw=none, mark=none, fill={rgb,255:red,0;   green,158; blue,115}] table [x=human, y=environment, col sep=comma] {new_plots/data/perf_by_env_mean_wide.csv};
    \addplot+[xbar, bar shift=\dimexpr 1\PerfBarSep\relax, draw=none, mark=none, fill={rgb,255:red,213; green,94;  blue,0}]   table [x=o3, y=environment, col sep=comma] {new_plots/data/perf_by_env_mean_wide.csv};
    % Autumn-simulator agent removed
    \legend{{claude-4-sonnet}, {gemini-2.5-pro}, {human}, {o3}}
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
